Internal Incident Notice — Falcon Palm Digital Holdings PJSC (Free Zone Reg. TL‑RAN‑25‑0098765) — Emirati PDPL handling required.
Date: 2026‑06‑05 11:20 GST; Contact: Ms. Laila Farouq, Compliance Officer, laila.farouq@falconpalm.ae, +971‑5X‑***‑**83.
A vendor phishing‑led mailbox takeover at Mirdan Tech Services LLC led to a one‑time SFTP pull of our KYC folder for token investors (files included partial Emirates ID scans, family‑origin notes, and IBAN redactions).
Example PII observed: “EID: 784‑2 0**‑**5678‑1” for Mr. Sami Al‑Murad (Head of DPT), “origin: Al‑Qamar family, Ras Al Noor”; phone: 050‑***‑9 4 2; sales deck avatar only, no biometrics.
Non‑public deal context impacted: draft commercial terms for our green DPT offering (OTC pre‑commit floor AED 3.20, 90‑day lock‑up, tranche sizes) and a provisional PDX listing timetable for Q3 were in the same directory.
Blackout window began 2026‑06‑01; insider list v.7 (internal ref IL‑FPDH‑07) was circulated under in for ma tion bar rier protocols; any external sharing could constitute tipping under Emirates Markets Authority rules.
Mr. Rami Nasser (CFO) and two treasury analysts were added to the insider list due to knowledge of selective‑disclosure risk from the cyber triage; their Emirates ID numbers are stored hashed (sha256) and masked in the tracker.
Containment: cloud keys rotated, vendor access revoked, audit trail sealed; no funds moved, and this is not expected to constitute a material adverse change for financing or listing eligibility at this time.
Notification: internal notice only for now; threshold assessment against RIFC financial‑centre guidance and EMA breach criteria ongoing; a draft form‑CIR is prepared but not filed.
ESG angle: a draft climate KPI annex (Scope‑2 grid factor for Ras Al Noor solar tie‑in) was attached to the same folder but remains a modeling worksheet and not a public commitment.
Education/marketing reuse (benign): our ESG brochure and crypto wallet explainer describe insider lists, cyber hygiene, and token custody at a high level for training and contain no issuer‑specific MNPI.
public‑source references (benign): we also considered published sector baselines from university studies and press articles when drafting the climate narrative; those materials are outside any blackout window.
ops notes (lowercase): next steps — finalize root‑cause, update insider‑list entries, tighten i b wall alerts, brief board risk cmte, and open jira ticket SEC‑ops‑1 9 4.
Access artifacts: https://portal.falconpalm.ae/case/INC-23%2F7a9?eid=784-****-**5678 and A c c o u n t‑ID 00 42 88‑FP‑KYC; vendor ip “185.**.36.7” seen; trade‑licence ref TL‑RAN‑25‑0098765‑Annex‑B.
Queries to compliance@falconpalm.ae; do not forward externally; this notice is subject to internal policy FP‑PDPL‑04 and the RIFC code of conduct; selective disclosure prohibitions apply even to well‑intentioned updates.
